title: Indus Gaming Modpack
description: The official Modpack used in the Indus Metropolis series on YouTube!
body:
**Indus Gaming Modpack – Official Edition** is the full modpack used in the _Indus Metropolis_ YouTube series. This pack contains the complete collection of mods that power the world of Velare City and beyond, offering the full Indus experience for players who want maximum realism and creative freedom.

Featuring a wide range of **furniture and decoration mods** for detailed interiors, **Minecraft Transit Railway** for advanced transport networks, and additional mods tailored for **transport hubs, stations, airports, and complex infrastructure builds**. World-building tools and visual enhancements are included throughout to create a highly immersive sandbox environment.

This official edition includes the entire, expansive feature set used in the YouTube series and is fully compatible with the **Indus Metropolis World Download**, offering the most accurate, true-to-series gameplay possible.

**Important**
- This modpack is compatible with the Indus Metropolis world download.
- It is strongly recommended to allocate at least 10GB+ of RAM for stable performance.
- Most crashes are caused by insufficient RAM or issues related to the British Transport Addon.
- For additional help, troubleshooting, or setup support, please join the Indus Gaming Discord community.

**Credits**
- Ultimate-USA-YT (Velare Rail Livery)
- Leo Minecraft 2.0 (Velare Blueline Announcements)
